productDisplayName: Playboy Men Casual Blue Casual Shoes
description: Designed for the cool and casual thinkers, this canvas shoe from playboy oozes confidence, style and comfort. Slip into these hi-ankle shoes and seize the day with much ease, while the fabric upper keeps you fresh and comfortable and the stylish lugs on the outsole enhance your fashion statement. Upper denim upper for easy maintenance and durability High ankle for extra support to the upper ankle and for style Carbon rubber toe box for enhanced protection to the toes Long canvas tongue for added comfort and snug Fit Lace-ups through metal eyelets for snug fit and durability Meshed metallic eyelets on the lateral forefoot and upper midfoot for enhanced ventilation Brand logo printed on lateral ankle for style Midsole Cushioned insole with a fabric footbed for all-day sweat-free comfort Outsole Vulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and traction Brand logo-shaped lugs throughout the outsole for absolute grip and traction on various surfaces
